creator: felek@felek.info
text:
When client are trying to download file from server (no matter how, http/ftp/scp), after several megabytes server resets the connection.

I have someting like this in logs:

TCP: [x.x.x.x]:34271 to [x.x.x.x]:80 tcpflags 0x4<RST>; syncache_chkrst: Spurious RST without matching syncache entry (possibly syncookie only), segment ignored

The network card in this server is RealTek 8168/8111B on re driver.
